mapper.insert: INSERT INTO conversation_memories ( user_id, title, content, mood, memory_date, image_url, created_at ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{title}, #{content}, #{mood}, #{memoryDate}, #{imageUrl}, NOW() )
mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id, title, content, mood, memory_date, image_url, created_at FROM conversation_memories WHERE id = #{id}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM conversation_memories WHERE user_id = #{userId}
